name: Claude 3
lineage_path: McCulloch-Pitts neuron -> Perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Seq2Seq -> Transformer -> Claude 1 -> Claude 3
summary: Claude 3 introduced a tiered model family (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku) offering different capability-cost tradeoffs, with Claude 3 Opus achieving frontier-level performance competitive with GPT-4. It added multimodal vision capabilities, a 200K token context window, and demonstrated substantial improvements in reasoning and reduced hallucination, solidifying Anthropic's position as a leading AI lab.
